Name: IMF.P.Log.Event
Purpose: Write operational IMF event log entries to control cubes or fallback logs.

Parameters.Name: pUseBedrock
Parameters.Description: Delegate server logging to Bedrock when Y.

Parameters.Name: pBedrockProcess
Parameters.Description: Bedrock or wrapper process used for standardized log output.

Parameters.Name: pStrictBedrock
Parameters.Description: Stop if Bedrock logging is requested but unavailable or failing.
